curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff and advisory description. The advisory explicitly lists PKCS12_parse(), PKCS12_unpack_p7data(), PKCS12_unpack_p7encdata(), PKCS12_unpack_authsafes(), and PKCS12_newpass() as vulnerable APIs. The patch also fixes SMIME_write_PKCS7() in crypto/pkcs7/pk7_mime.c, but the advisory states this is not considered security significant since it is a write-path function. pkcs12_gen_mac is included because the patch adds the same NULL check pattern there. The noisy_patch flag is true because 4 non-test source files were changed (>3 threshold). No sibling files in crypto/pkcs12/ were found to have the same unpatched vulnerability pattern.
